label: AgentCard
note: Prepaid virtual Visa cards for AI agents. Fund a card, expose it via MCP so agents can create cards, list cards, get details, check balance, close cards, and record payments. Single-use by default with scoped spend limits; works anywhere Visa is accepted. CLI and MCP for Claude Desktop and Cursor. Listed for MCP and agentic payments discovery (not an open banking account aggregator).
